name: Skinstitch Salve
description:
This sticky salve stubbornly holds wounds closed and encourages swift natural healing. You can activate the salve in either of the following ways.

Activate—Administer Stitch (1 Action) (manipulate)

Effect You Administer First Aid without requiring Healer's Toolkit. You either gain a +2 item bonus to the Medicine check, or you can use the skinstitch salve's Medicine modifier of 1d20+13 instead of your own.

Activate—Stitch Wounds (Free Action) (manipulate)

Trigger You Treat Wounds or use Battle Medicine

Effect You gain a +2 item bonus to the triggering Medicine check. If you roll a success on the Medicine check, you get a critical success instead.

Effect: Skinstitch Salve
